comment: hippo48-500k-r2: re-run of the diverged 19 Jul hippo48-500k with grad-norm clipping (1.0) now in the loop - the only recipe delta, so the point stays comparable to hippo48-100k/hippo48-1m. Fresh run name so the original's finished-state events on the volume cannot trip the skip guard, and its artefacts stay separate. Shards 0-3 (~463k usable).
